final:
module top_module(
    input           [15:0]                              imm ,
    input                                               expand  ,
    output          [31:0]                              expand_imm
    );assign expand_imm = expand ? {{16{imm[15]}}, imm} : {16'h0, imm};

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      expand_imm <= 32'hFFFFFFFF;
    end
  end

endmodule
